summary: W934 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while exposing W933's exact-acyclic homotopy-object witness as degreewise QuillenExactCategory.Conflation data on the witness object's underlying cochain complex. boundedHomotopyLocalizedUnitIsoClosureWitnessOfConflationPrimitiveW934 reconstructs the W933 exact-acyclic homotopy-object witness before delegating through the W933/W932/W931/W930 route stack. Product success remains false because all W934 route leaves are still explicit assumptions and the original four-task completion witness and review packet remain incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W934 only refines the localized adjunction unit membership from an exact-acyclic homotopy object witness to degreewise Quillen conflations plus an isomorphism witness, while those conflations and the rest of the W934 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W934 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W934 fields include raw WPP-limit boundary propositions, primitive relation-pullback and target-relation-lift propositions, primitive target-difference and target-codomain compactness quantifiers, primitive selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closed-map propositions, strict preimage object and map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, raw fixed-target uniqueness quantifier fields, raw source-category pretriangulated and triangulated propositions, the raw source-side triangle-completion proposition, endpoint closed-embedding/open-map/ExactAt-to-epi facts, bounded-homotopy localized right-adjoint fields, and the unit mapping-cone conflation witness.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
